name: Shining Smite
description: The target hit by the strike takes an extra 2d6 radiant damage from the attack. Until the spell ends, the target sheds bright light in a 5-foot radius, attack rolls against it have advantage, and it can't benefit from the invisible condition. When you cast this spell using a higher-level spell slot, the damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 2.
